hero.name: Hoang Dung
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.tagline: I build reliable, fast web applications end to end — and this site runs an AI that can tell you all about me, right in your browser.

about.heading: About
about.body: I'm a Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building web applications across the stack. I care about clean architecture, performance, and developer experience, and I enjoy turning fuzzy product ideas into polished, reliable software.

exp1.desc: Build and maintain a management dashboard with React and TypeScript. Led a performance initiative that cut initial load time by 40%, and mentored 2 junior engineers.

exp2.desc: Built a cross-platform mobile app with React Native and a REST API backend. Set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions and automated tests, shipping weekly.

exp3.desc: Developed marketing websites and internal tools with responsive, accessible UIs and third-party API integrations.

proj1.name: AI Profile Website
proj1.desc: This very site: a client-side portfolio with an in-browser AI chatbot (Qwen2.5-0.5B) and RAG over my knowledge base — no backend.

proj2.name: Realtime Analytics Dashboard
proj2.desc: Live metrics with charts and filters, optimized to render thousands of data points smoothly over WebSocket.

proj3.name: E-commerce Mobile App
proj3.desc: Cross-platform shopping app with cart, payments, and push notifications.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Have an opportunity or a question? Send me a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

form.name: Name
